blockers.reason: Quality gate requires KI continuation prompts on canonical-truth governance files, but two referenced files are owner-protected canonical-truth files and should not be modified without explicit owner approval.
blockers.whyNotFixedInThisPr: Required KI-Fortsetzungs-Prompt check still flags two owner-protected canonical-truth files. This PR keeps owner-protection intact and uses non-protected companion prompts/proposals only.
